reasoning: The baseline value on 2025-04-13 was 63.95. Because the 7-day trailing average calculation will soon drop these high spike values and replace them with the newer, lower raw values, the index is mathematically primed for a sharp decline over the next week. Unless a major structural reversal occurs within the next 3–6 months, all subsequent target dates are more likely to be below the artificially high recent local maximum of 63.95. Therefore, the probabilities of an increase relative to 63.95 remain low, albeit increasing toward 0.5 as the forecast horizon lengthens and variance naturally grows.
